text.title: Claude API Basics Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract for the subagent bootstrapping the Anthropic SDK client. Captures auth source, pinned model, retry policy, cost-tracker installation, and `x-request-id` capture.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)
section.code: { "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#", "type": "object", "title": "claude-api-basics-output", "required": [ "auth_source", "model_id", "retry_policy", "cost_tracker_installed", "request_id_logged", "forbidden_seen" ], "properties": { "auth_source": {"description": "Where API key is loaded from; must be 'env'."}, "model_id": {"description": "Pinned full-date model id."}, "retry_policy": {"description": "Object with retry_on (list of error types), max_attempts (int)."}, "cost_tracker_installed": {"description": "Boolean — is a CostTracker bound to the client?"}, "request_id_logged": {"description": "Boolean — does the wrapper log x-request-id on every call?"}, "forbidden_seen": {"description": "Forbidden patterns matched; must be empty."} } }

required.field: Source of the API key; must be "env".
Forbidden patterns matched; must be empty.

forbidden.pattern: Model id without a full-date suffix (alias only).

example.note: All forbidden patterns absent; retry covers 529 explicitly.
Every forbidden pattern triggered — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
